name: Picker
summary: The Picker class can be used to query the user to do manual picks of objects and points from the Tekla Structures model. The methods throw an exception if the user interrupts (cancels) the pick command.

methods.name: PickFace.
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a face from the model.

methods.name: PickFace(String)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a face from the model with the given prompt.

methods.name: PickLine.
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a line from the model.

methods.name: PickLine(String)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a line from the model with the given prompt.

methods.name: PickObject(Picker.PickObjectEnum)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick one model object from the model.

methods.name: PickObject(Picker.PickObjectEnum, String)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick one model object from the model with the given prompt.

methods.name: PickObjects(Picker.PickObjectsEnum)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick model objects from the model.

methods.name: PickObjects(Picker.PickObjectsEnum, String)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick model objects from the model with the given prompt.

methods.name: PickPoint.
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a point from the model.

methods.name: PickPoint(String)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a point from the model with the given prompt.

methods.name: PickPoint(Point)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick a point from the model with reference to the given point.

methods.name: PickPoint(String, Point)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick point with given prompt and reference to another point.

methods.name: PickPoints(Picker.PickPointEnum)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick points from the model.

methods.name: PickPoints(Picker.PickPointEnum, String)
methods.summary: Queries the user to pick points from the model with the given prompt and reference to another point.
